items.author: ops_ai_lab
items.text: A planning agent that turns warehouse constraints into a daily schedule is more useful when it can show the violated assumptions.

items.author: supply_chain_ai
items.text: Retail inventory copilots need exception handling and trust calibration more than another generic chat interface.

items.author: agent_runtime
items.text: Agent workflows fail when review loops lack artifact hashes and a durable owner for the next state.

items.author: planning_notes
items.text: The best optimization systems explain the tradeoff they rejected, not just the answer they selected.

items.author: ai_eval_ops
items.text: Eval design for agents should measure recovery from stale context, not only first-pass answer quality.
